---
pagetitle: "Variant Browser"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

# Build columnDefs and ColVis targets for a dataframe with n_default visible cols
# and n_internal trailing internal cols (hidden, excluded from ColVis)
dt_coldefs <- function(df, n_default, n_internal = 3) {
  n        <- ncol(df)
  internal <- (n - n_internal):(n - 1)
  extra    <- if (n > n_default + n_internal) n_default:(n - n_internal - 1) else integer(0)
  defs     <- list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = internal))
  if (length(extra) > 0) defs <- c(defs, list(list(visible = FALSE, targets = extra)))
  list(col_defs = defs, colvis_targets = 0:(n - n_internal - 1))
}
```

```{=html}
<div id="app-header">
  <span id="app-title">CAVALIER Variant Browser</span>
  <div id="app-logo-wrap">
    <img src="https://www.wehi.edu.au/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/logo@2x-compressed.png" id="app-logo" alt="WEHI logo">
  </div>
</div>

<div id="vtype-container" class="vtype-container">
  <div class="tab-bar">
    <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="vtab-short">Short Variants</button>
    <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="vtab-struc">Structural Variants</button>
  </div>
  <div id="tab-vtab-short" class="tab-panel active" style="padding:12px;">
```

```{r load_short, include=FALSE}
default_cols <-
  c('family_id', 'SYMBOL', 'CHROM', 'POS', 'REF', 'ALT', 'Consequence', 'IMPACT', 'CLNSIG', 'gnomad_AF', 'CADD')

variants <-
  read_csv('short_candidates.csv') %>%
  select(all_of(default_cols), everything()) %>%
  left_join(
    read_tsv('slides.txt', col_names = 'pdf') %>% 
      tidyr::extract(
        pdf,
        into = c("family_id", "variant_id"),
        regex = "^([^\\.]+).+\\.([^\\.]+)\\.pdf",
        remove = FALSE
      ) %>% 
      mutate(
        pdf = file.path('by_family', family_id, 'varslides', pdf)
      ),
    by = join_by(family_id, variant_id)
  ) %>% 
  left_join(
    read_tsv('igv_report.txt', col_names = 'igv') %>% 
      tidyr::extract(
        igv,
        into = c("family_id"),
        regex = "^([^\\.]+)\\.",
        remove = FALSE
      ) %>% 
      mutate(
        igv = file.path('by_family', family_id, igv)
      ),
    by = join_by(family_id)
  ) %>% 
  group_by(family_id) %>% 
  mutate(
    row_id = row_number() - 1L
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    spliceai_url = str_c(
      "https://spliceailookup.broadinstitute.org/#hg=38&variant=", URLencode(variant_id)
    ),
    ucsc_url = {
      track <- str_c(
        'track name="', VARIANT_CLASS, '" visibility=2 color=0,0,255\n',
        CHROM, " ", POS, " ", POS +1L
      )
      str_c(
        "https://genome.ucsc.edu/cgi-bin/hgTracks?db=hg38&",
        "position=", CHROM, ":", POS - 250, "-", POS + 250, "&",
        "hgt.customText=", URLencode(track)
      )
    },
    ucsc_render_url = str_replace(ucsc_url, 'hgTracks', 'hgRenderTracks')
  )

cd              <- dt_coldefs(variants, length(default_cols), n_internal = 6)
gene_col_short   <- which(names(variants) == "Gene")   - 1L
symbol_col_short <- which(names(variants) == "SYMBOL") - 1L
```

```{r show_short, echo=FALSE}
datatable(
  variants %>% mutate(across(where(~ is.character(.) && n_distinct(.) <= 10), as.factor)),
  escape = FALSE, selection = "none", rownames = FALSE,
  filter = 'top', extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10, dom = 'Blfrtip', autoWidth = FALSE,
    buttons = list(list(extend = 'colvis', columns = cd$colvis_targets)),
    columnDefs = cd$col_defs,
    rowCallback = JS(paste0("
      function(row, data) {
        var n = data.length;
        $(row).attr('data-pdf',             data[n-6]);
        $(row).attr('data-html',            data[n-5]);
        $(row).attr('data-row-id',          data[n-4]);
        $(row).attr('data-spliceai-url',    data[n-3]);
        $(row).attr('data-ucsc-url',        data[n-2]);
        $(row).attr('data-ucsc-render-url', data[n-1]);
        $(row).attr('data-gene',            data[", gene_col_short, "]);
        $(row).attr('data-symbol',          data[", symbol_col_short, "]);
        $(row).css('cursor', 'pointer');
      }
    "))
  ),
  callback = JS("
    table.on('click', 'tbody tr', function() {
      table.$('tr.selected-row').removeClass('selected-row');
      $(this).addClass('selected-row');
      loadSample(
        $(this).data('pdf'), $(this).data('html'), Number($(this).data('row-id')),
        $(this).data('spliceai-url'), $(this).data('ucsc-url'), $(this).data('ucsc-render-url'),
        $(this).data('gene'), $(this).data('symbol')
      );
    });
  ")
)
```

```{=html}
  </div>
  <div id="tab-vtab-struc" class="tab-panel active" style="padding:12px;">
```

```{r load_struc, include=FALSE}
default_cols_struc <-
  c('family_id', 'SYMBOL', 'CHROM', 'POS', 'END', 'SVTYPE', 'SVLEN', 'Consequence', 'IMPACT', 'Max_AF')

struc_variants <-
  read_csv("struc_candidates.csv") %>%
  select(all_of(default_cols_struc), everything()) %>%
  left_join(
    read_tsv('slides.txt', col_names = 'pdf') %>% 
      tidyr::extract(
        pdf,
        into = c("family_id", "variant_id"),
        regex = "^([^\\.]+).+\\.([^\\.]+)\\.pdf",
        remove = FALSE
      ) %>% 
      mutate(
        pdf = file.path('by_family', family_id, 'varslides', pdf)
      ),
    by = join_by(family_id, variant_id)
  ) %>% 
  left_join(
    read_tsv('svpv.txt', col_names = 'svpv') %>% 
      tidyr::extract(
        svpv,
        into = c("family_id", "CHROM", "POS", "SVTYPE"),
        regex = "^([^\\.]+)\\.([^\\.]+)\\.([0-9]+)\\.([^\\.]+)",
        remove = FALSE
      ) %>% 
      mutate(
        POS = as.numeric(POS),
        svpv = file.path("by_family", family_id, "svpv", svpv)
      ),
    by = c("family_id", "CHROM", "POS", "SVTYPE"),
  ) %>% 
  left_join(
    read_tsv('samplot.txt', col_names = 'samplot') %>% 
      tidyr::extract(
        samplot,
        into = c("family_id", "variant_id"),
        regex = "([^\\.]+)\\.([^\\.]+)\\.png",
        remove = FALSE
      ) %>% 
      mutate(
        samplot = file.path("by_family", family_id, "samplot", samplot)
      ),
    by = c("family_id", "variant_id"),
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    ucsc_url = {
      colour <- case_when(
        SVTYPE == "DEL" ~ "255,0,0",
        SVTYPE == "DUP" ~ "0,255,0",
        TRUE ~ "0,0,255"
      )
      width <- pmax(250, END - POS)
      track <- str_c(
        'track name="', SVTYPE, '" visibility=2 color=', colour, "\n",
        CHROM, " ", POS, " ", coalesce(END, POS + 1)
      )
      str_c(
        "https://genome.ucsc.edu/cgi-bin/hgTracks?db=hg38&",
        "position=", CHROM, ":", POS - width, "-", END + width, "&",
        "hgt.customText=", URLencode(track)
      )
    },
    ucsc_render_url = str_replace(ucsc_url, 'hgTracks', 'hgRenderTracks')
  )

cd_s            <- dt_coldefs(struc_variants, length(default_cols_struc), n_internal = 5)
gene_col_struc   <- which(names(struc_variants) == "Gene")   - 1L
symbol_col_struc <- which(names(struc_variants) == "SYMBOL") - 1L
```

```{r show_struc, echo=FALSE}
datatable(
  struc_variants %>% mutate(across(where(~ is.character(.) && n_distinct(.) <= 10), as.factor)),
  escape = FALSE, selection = "none", rownames = FALSE,
  filter = 'top', extensions = "Buttons",
  options = list(
    pageLength = 10, dom = 'Blfrtip', autoWidth = FALSE,
    buttons = list(list(extend = 'colvis', columns = cd_s$colvis_targets)),
    columnDefs = cd_s$col_defs,
    rowCallback = JS(paste0("
      function(row, data) {
        var n = data.length;
        $(row).attr('data-pdf',              data[n-5]);
        $(row).attr('data-svpv',             data[n-4]);
        $(row).attr('data-samplot',          data[n-3]);
        $(row).attr('data-ucsc-url',         data[n-2]);
        $(row).attr('data-ucsc-render-url',  data[n-1]);
        $(row).attr('data-gene',             data[", gene_col_struc, "]);
        $(row).attr('data-symbol',           data[", symbol_col_struc, "]);
        $(row).css('cursor', 'pointer');
      }
    "))
  ),
  callback = JS("
    table.on('click', 'tbody tr', function() {
      table.$('tr.selected-row').removeClass('selected-row');
      $(this).addClass('selected-row');
      loadStrucSample(
        $(this).data('pdf'), $(this).data('samplot'), $(this).data('svpv'),
        $(this).data('ucsc-url'), $(this).data('ucsc-render-url'),
        $(this).data('gene'), $(this).data('symbol')
      );
    });
  ")
)
```

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 14px;">

  <div id="viewer-short" class="viewer-container">
    <div class="tab-bar">
      <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="slides">Slides</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="igv">IGV</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="spliceai-lookup">SpliceAI Lookup</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="ucsc-short">Genome Browser</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="gene-info-short">Gene Info</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="panelapp-short">PanelApp</button>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-slides" class="tab-panel active">
      <iframe id="viewer-pdf"></iframe>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-igv" class="tab-panel">
      <iframe id="viewer-igv"></iframe>
      <p class="citation"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btac830" target="_blank">Robinson et al. (2022) Bioinformatics. doi:10.1093/bioinformatics/btac830</a></p>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-spliceai-lookup" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="btn-bar">
        <a id="spliceai-link" href="#" target="_blank" class="ucsc-btn">Go to SpliceAI Lookup</a>
      </div>
      <iframe id="viewer-spliceai"></iframe>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-ucsc-short" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="btn-bar">
        <a id="ucsc-link-short" href="#" target="_blank" class="ucsc-btn">Open interactive UCSC Genome Browser</a>
      </div>
      <iframe id="viewer-ucsc-short"></iframe>
      <p class="citation"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkaf1250" target="_blank">Casper et al. (2025) Nucleic Acids Research. doi:10.1093/nar/gkaf1250</a></p>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-gene-info-short" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="gene-info-panel">
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">HGNC</summary>
          <div id="hgnc-data-short" class="hgnc-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">HPO</summary>
          <div class="info-placeholder">Coming soon.</div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-panelapp-short" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="gene-info-panel">
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">PanelApp Australia</summary>
          <div id="panelapp-aus-short" class="panelapp-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">Genomics England PanelApp</summary>
          <div id="panelapp-gel-short" class="panelapp-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="viewer-struc" class="viewer-container" style="display:none;">
    <div class="tab-bar">
      <button class="tab-btn active" data-tab="struc-slides">Slides</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="svpv">SVPV</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="samplot">Samplot</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="ucsc">Genome Browser</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="gene-info-struc">Gene Info</button>
      <button class="tab-btn"        data-tab="panelapp-struc">PanelApp</button>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-struc-slides" class="tab-panel active">
      <iframe id="viewer-struc-pdf"></iframe>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-svpv" class="tab-panel">
      <iframe id="viewer-svpv"></iframe>
      <p class="citation"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btx117" target="_blank">Munro et al. (2017) Bioinformatics. doi:10.1093/bioinformatics/btx117</a></p>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-samplot" class="tab-panel">
      <img id="viewer-samplot" style="display:block; width:100%; max-width:1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
      <p class="citation"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-021-02380-5" target="_blank">Belyeu et al. (2021) Genome Biology. doi:10.1186/s13059-021-02380-5</a></p>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-ucsc" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="btn-bar">
        <a id="ucsc-link" href="#" target="_blank" class="ucsc-btn">Open interactive UCSC Genome Browser</a>
      </div>
      <iframe id="viewer-ucsc"></iframe>
      <p class="citation"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkaf1250" target="_blank">Casper et al. (2025) Nucleic Acids Research. doi:10.1093/nar/gkaf1250</a></p>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-gene-info-struc" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="gene-info-panel">
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">HGNC</summary>
          <div id="hgnc-data-struc" class="hgnc-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">HPO</summary>
          <div class="info-placeholder">Coming soon.</div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div id="tab-panelapp-struc" class="tab-panel">
      <div class="gene-info-panel">
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">PanelApp Australia</summary>
          <div id="panelapp-aus-struc" class="panelapp-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
        <details class="info-section" open>
          <summary class="info-section-title">Genomics England PanelApp</summary>
          <div id="panelapp-gel-struc" class="panelapp-data">
            <span class="info-placeholder">Select a variant to load gene information.</span>
          </div>
        </details>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

<style>
/* ── Global ── */
body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }

/* ── Header ── */
#app-header {
  background-color: #49A942;
  color: white;
  padding: 14px 28px;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 14px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
#app-logo-wrap {
  background-color: white;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}
#app-logo {
  height: 36px;
  width: auto;
}
#app-title {
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.4px;
}

/* ── DataTable ── */
table.dataTable tbody tr       { transition: background 0.12s; }
table.dataTable tbody tr:hover td { background-color: #f0faf0 !important; }
tr.selected-row td             { background-color: #d6f0d5 !important; }
table.dataTable thead th       { background-color: #f6f6f6; border-bottom: 2px solid #49A942 !important; }
table.dataTable td, table.dataTable th {
  max-width: 200px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ── ColVis / Buttons ── */
.dt-buttons .dt-button {
  background: #2372B9 !important;
  color: white !important;
  border: none !important;
  border-radius: 4px !important;
  padding: 5px 14px !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  transition: background 0.15s !important;
}
.dt-buttons .dt-button:hover { background: #1a5899 !important; }

/* ── Containers (vtype + viewer) ── */
.vtype-container, .viewer-container {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 0 6px 6px 6px;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}
.vtype-container  { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.viewer-container { overflow: hidden; }

/* ── Tab bar ── */
.tab-bar {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #49A942;
  background: #f4f4f4;
  padding: 8px 8px 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
.tab-btn {
  padding: 8px 24px;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: none;
  border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #555;
  position: relative;
  bottom: -2px;
  transition: color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
}
.tab-btn:hover:not(.active) { background: #e4e4e4; color: #333; }
.tab-btn.active {
  background: white;
  border-color: #49A942;
  color: #2372B9;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.tab-panel        { display: none; }
.tab-panel.active { display: block; }

.container      { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
.main-container { width: 95% !important; max-width: 95% !important; }

.tab-panel iframe { width: 100%; height: 800px; border: none; display: block; }
.btn-bar { padding: 10px 12px 0; }

.citation {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: #888;
  margin: 4px 12px 6px;
}
.citation a { color: #888; }
.citation a:hover { color: #555; }

/* ── Gene Info panel ── */
.gene-info-panel { padding: 12px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }

.info-section {
  border: 1px solid #c8e6c8;
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.info-section-title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #333;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  background: #edf7ed;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  border-left: 3px solid #49A942;
}
.info-section-title::before {
  content: '▾';
  font-size: 15px;
  transition: transform 0.15s;
  display: inline-block;
  color: #49A942;
}
.info-section[open] > .info-section-title::before { transform: rotate(0deg); }
.info-section:not([open]) > .info-section-title::before { transform: rotate(-90deg); }

.hgnc-data { padding: 12px 14px; }
.info-placeholder { color: #aaa; font-size: 13px; padding: 8px 14px; display: block; }

.hgnc-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e4f1e4;
}
.hgnc-symbol {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: white;
  background: #49A942;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}
.hgnc-name   { font-size: 14px; color: #444; }
.hgnc-meta   { font-size: 12px; color: #777; margin-bottom: 10px; }

.hgnc-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto 1fr;
  column-gap: 20px;
  row-gap: 5px;
  font-size: 13px;
  align-items: baseline;
}
.hg-l { font-weight: 600; color: #333; white-space: nowrap; }
.hg-v { color: #222; }

/* ── PanelApp ── */
.panelapp-data { padding: 10px 14px 6px; }

details.pa-entry {
  border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  border-radius: 5px;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.pa-header {
  background: #f6f6f6;
  padding: 7px 12px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
  list-style: none;
}
.pa-header::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.pa-header::before { content: '▾'; color: #aaa; font-size: 14px; transition: transform 0.15s; display: inline-block; flex-shrink: 0; }
details.pa-entry[open] > .pa-header { border-bottom: 1px solid #e8e8e8; }
details.pa-entry:not([open]) > .pa-header::before { transform: rotate(-90deg); }

.pa-badge, .pa-moi-short {
  display: inline-block;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700;
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.pa-badge     { color: white; }
.pa-green     { background: #49A942; }
.pa-amber     { background: #e8960a; }
.pa-red       { background: #d9363e; }
.pa-grey      { background: #888; }
.pa-moi-short { color: #444; background: #e4e4e4; }

.pa-panel-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; }
.pa-panel-name:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.pa-details {
  padding: 8px 12px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.pa-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: baseline; }
.pa-label { font-weight: 600; color: #555; min-width: 100px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pa-val   { color: #222; }
.pa-publist { margin: 0; padding-left: 18px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; }

.hgnc-meta a, .hg-v a, .pa-val a, .pa-panel-name { color: #2372B9; }

.ucsc-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #2372B9;
  color: white !important;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 6px 16px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
.ucsc-btn:hover { background: #1a5899; }
</style>

<script>
var _pendingIgv           = null;
var _pendingSpliceAI      = null;
var _pendingSvpv          = null;
var _pendingUcscShort     = null;
var _pendingUcsc          = null;
var _pendingGeneInfoShort = null;
var _pendingGeneInfoStruc = null;
var _pdfTimeout           = null;
var _strucPdfTimeout      = null;
var _hgncCache            = Object.create(null);
var _pubmedCache          = Object.create(null);
var _panelappAusCache     = Object.create(null);
var _panelappGelCache     = Object.create(null);
var _pendingPanelAppShort = null;
var _pendingPanelAppStruc = null;
var _activeTabs = { 'vtype-container': 'vtab-short', 'viewer-short': 'slides', 'viewer-struc': 'struc-slides' };

// Both panels start visible so DataTables can measure column widths during init.
// After DT's $(document).ready() has run, hide the struc panel.
$(document).ready(function() {
  document.getElementById('tab-vtab-struc').classList.remove('active');
});

function switchTab(container, tab) {
  container.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
  container.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
  container.querySelector('[data-tab="' + tab + '"]').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('tab-' + tab).classList.add('active');
}

// All tab switching
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if (!e.target.matches('.tab-btn')) return;
  var tab       = e.target.getAttribute('data-tab');
  var container = e.target.closest('.viewer-container, .vtype-container');
  _activeTabs[container.id] = tab;
  switchTab(container, tab);

  // Vtype tab: show the matching viewer, hide the other
  if (tab === 'vtab-short' || tab === 'vtab-struc') {
    document.getElementById('viewer-short').style.display = tab === 'vtab-short' ? '' : 'none';
    document.getElementById('viewer-struc').style.display = tab === 'vtab-struc' ? '' : 'none';
    return;
  }

  // Viewer tab lazy loads
  if (tab === 'spliceai-lookup' && _pendingSpliceAI) {
    var spliceaiIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-spliceai');
    spliceaiIframe.src = '';
    spliceaiIframe.src = _pendingSpliceAI;
    _pendingSpliceAI = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'igv' && _pendingIgv) {
    var igvUrl = _pendingIgv;
    _pendingIgv = null;
    loadIgvIframe(igvUrl);
  }
  if (tab === 'svpv' && _pendingSvpv) {
    document.getElementById('viewer-svpv').src = _pendingSvpv;
    _pendingSvpv = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'ucsc-short' && _pendingUcscShort) {
    var ucscShortIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-ucsc-short');
    document.getElementById('ucsc-link-short').href = _pendingUcscShort.url;
    ucscShortIframe.src = ucscWithPix(_pendingUcscShort.renderUrl, ucscShortIframe);
    _pendingUcscShort = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'ucsc' && _pendingUcsc) {
    var ucscIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-ucsc');
    document.getElementById('ucsc-link').href = _pendingUcsc.url;
    ucscIframe.src = ucscWithPix(_pendingUcsc.renderUrl, ucscIframe);
    _pendingUcsc = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'gene-info-short' && _pendingGeneInfoShort) {
    loadGeneInfo(_pendingGeneInfoShort, 'short');
    _pendingGeneInfoShort = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'gene-info-struc' && _pendingGeneInfoStruc) {
    loadGeneInfo(_pendingGeneInfoStruc, 'struc');
    _pendingGeneInfoStruc = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'panelapp-short' && _pendingPanelAppShort) {
    loadPanelApp(_pendingPanelAppShort.symbol, _pendingPanelAppShort.geneId, 'short');
    _pendingPanelAppShort = null;
  }
  if (tab === 'panelapp-struc' && _pendingPanelAppStruc) {
    loadPanelApp(_pendingPanelAppStruc.symbol, _pendingPanelAppStruc.geneId, 'struc');
    _pendingPanelAppStruc = null;
  }
});

function ucscWithPix(url, iframeEl) {
  var w = iframeEl.clientWidth || iframeEl.offsetWidth || 800;
  return url + '&pix=' + w;
}

async function fetchHgnc(ensemblGeneId) {
  if (ensemblGeneId in _hgncCache) return _hgncCache[ensemblGeneId];
  try {
    var r    = await fetch('https://rest.genenames.org/fetch/ensembl_gene_id/' + encodeURIComponent(ensemblGeneId),
                           { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } });
    var json = await r.json();
    var doc  = (json.response && json.response.docs && json.response.docs[0]) || null;
    _hgncCache[ensemblGeneId] = doc;
    return doc;
  } catch(e) {
    _hgncCache[ensemblGeneId] = null;
    return null;
  }
}

function renderHgnc(doc) {
  if (!doc) return '<span class="info-placeholder">No HGNC record found.</span>';
  function esc(s) { return String(s).replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }
  function lnk(href, text) { return '<a href="' + esc(href) + '" target="_blank">' + esc(text) + '</a>'; }
  function arr(v) { return Array.isArray(v) ? v : (v ? [v] : []); }
  function maneLnk(id) {
    return id.startsWith('ENST')
      ? lnk('https://www.ensembl.org/Homo_sapiens/Transcript/Summary?db=core;t=' + id.split('.')[0], id)
      : lnk('https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/nuccore/' + id, id);
  }

  var hgncUrl = 'https://www.genenames.org/data/gene-symbol-report/#!/hgnc_id/' + doc.hgnc_id;
  var html =
    '<div class="hgnc-header">' +
      '<span class="hgnc-symbol">' + esc(doc.symbol) + '</span>' +
      '<span class="hgnc-name">'   + esc(doc.name)   + '</span>' +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="hgnc-meta">' +
      lnk(hgncUrl, doc.hgnc_id) +
      (doc.location ? ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; ' + esc(doc.location) : '') +
      ' &nbsp;·&nbsp; ' + esc(doc.status) +
    '</div>' +
    '<div class="hgnc-grid">';

  function cell(label, val) {
    return '<span class="hg-l">' + label + '</span><span class="hg-v">' + (val || '') + '</span>';
  }

  // Interleaved so 4-column grid renders as: col1-label | col1-value | col2-label | col2-value
  html += cell('Ensembl', lnk('https://www.ensembl.org/id/' + esc(doc.ensembl_gene_id), esc(doc.ensembl_gene_id)));
  html += cell('Locus type',      esc(doc.locus_type));
  html += cell('Entrez',  doc.entrez_id ? lnk('https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/gene/' + doc.entrez_id, doc.entrez_id) : '');
  html += cell('Previous symbol', arr(doc.prev_symbol).map(esc).join(', '));
  html += cell('OMIM',    arr(doc.omim_id).map(function(id)     { return lnk('https://www.omim.org/entry/' + id, id); }).join(', '));
  html += cell('Alias symbols',   arr(doc.alias_symbol).map(esc).join(', '));
  html += cell('UniProt', arr(doc.uniprot_ids).map(function(id) { return lnk('https://www.uniprot.org/uniprot/' + id, id); }).join(', '));
  html += cell('MANE select', arr(doc.mane_select).map(maneLnk).join(', '));
  html += '</div>';
  return html;
}

async function loadGeneInfo(ensemblGeneId, suffix) {
  var hgncEl = document.getElementById('hgnc-data-' + suffix);
  if (hgncEl) {
    hgncEl.innerHTML = '<span class="info-placeholder">Loading\u2026</span>';
    hgncEl.innerHTML = renderHgnc(await fetchHgnc(ensemblGeneId));
  }
}

async function fetchPubmedSummaries(pmids) {
  var toFetch = pmids.filter(function(id) { return !(id in _pubmedCache); });
  if (!toFetch.length) return;
  try {
    var r    = await fetch('https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/esummary.fcgi?db=pubmed&id=' + toFetch.join(',') + '&retmode=json');
    var json = await r.json();
    var res  = json.result || {};
    toFetch.forEach(function(id) { _pubmedCache[id] = res[id] || null; });
  } catch(e) {
    toFetch.forEach(function(id) { _pubmedCache[id] = null; });
  }
}

function formatPubmedRef(pmid) {
  function esc(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }
  var url  = 'https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/' + pmid + '/';
  var doc  = _pubmedCache[String(pmid)];
  if (!doc) return '<a href="' + url + '" target="_blank">PMID:' + pmid + '</a>';
  var title   = esc((doc.title || '').replace(/\.$/, ''));
  var authors = doc.authors || [];
  var auth    = authors.length ? esc(authors[0].name) + (authors.length > 1 ? ' et al.' : '') : '';
  var journal = esc(doc.source || '');
  var year    = esc((doc.pubdate || '').split(' ')[0]);
  return '<a href="' + url + '" target="_blank">\u201c' + title + '\u201d</a>' +
    (auth    ? ', ' + auth    : '') +
    (journal ? ', <em>' + journal + '</em>' : '') +
    (year    ? ' (' + year + ')' : '');
}

async function queryPanelApp(symbol, baseUrl, cache) {
  if (symbol in cache) return cache[symbol];
  try {
    var r    = await fetch(baseUrl + '/api/v1/genes/?entity_name=' + encodeURIComponent(symbol));
    var json = await r.json();
    var res  = json.results || [];
    cache[symbol] = res;
    return res;
  } catch(e) {
    return null;
  }
}

function renderPanelApp(results, baseUrl) {
  if (!results || results.length === 0)
    return '<span class="info-placeholder">No entries found.</span>';

  function esc(s) { return String(s || '').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;'); }

  function linkPhenotype(s) {
    var e = esc(s);
    e = e.replace(/(?:OMIM\s*#|MIM#)\s*(\d+)/gi, function(m, id) {
      return '<a href="https://www.omim.org/entry/' + id + '" target="_blank">' + m + '</a>';
    });
    e = e.replace(/MONDO:(\d+)/g, function(m, id) {
      return '<a href="https://monarchinitiative.org/disease/MONDO:' + id + '" target="_blank">' + m + '</a>';
    });
    return e;
  }

  var confMap = { '3': ['GREEN','pa-green'], '2': ['AMBER','pa-amber'], '1': ['RED','pa-red'] };

  results = results.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
    var cl = parseInt(b.confidence_level) - parseInt(a.confidence_level);
    if (cl !== 0) return cl;
    return (a.panel.name || '').localeCompare(b.panel.name || '');
  });

  return results.map(function(r) {
    var conf     = confMap[r.confidence_level] || ['?', 'pa-grey'];
    var panelUrl = baseUrl + '/panels/' + r.panel.id + '/gene/' + encodeURIComponent(r.entity_name) + '/';
    var moiShort = ((r.mode_of_inheritance || '').split(/[\s,]/)[0].toUpperCase()) || 'UNKNOWN';
    var phenoHtml = (r.phenotypes || []).map(linkPhenotype).join('<br>') ||
                    '<span style="color:#aaa">—</span>';
    var pubs = (r.publications || []).map(function(p) {
      var m = String(p).match(/\d+/);
      return m ? formatPubmedRef(m[0]) : null;
    }).filter(Boolean);
    var pubHtml = pubs.length
      ? '<ul class="pa-publist">' + pubs.map(function(ref) { return '<li>' + ref + '</li>'; }).join('') + '</ul>'
      : '<span style="color:#aaa">—</span>';
    var moi = esc(r.mode_of_inheritance) || '<span style="color:#aaa">—</span>';

    return '<details class="pa-entry">' +
      '<summary class="pa-header">' +
        '<span class="pa-badge ' + conf[1] + '">' + conf[0] + '</span>' +
        (moiShort ? '<span class="pa-moi-short">' + esc(moiShort) + '</span>' : '') +
        '<a href="' + esc(panelUrl) + '" target="_blank" class="pa-panel-name" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">' + esc(r.panel.name) + '</a>' +
      '</summary>' +
      '<div class="pa-details">' +
        '<div class="pa-row"><span class="pa-label">MOI</span><span class="pa-val">' + moi + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="pa-row"><span class="pa-label">Phenotypes</span><span class="pa-val">' + phenoHtml + '</span></div>' +
        '<div class="pa-row"><span class="pa-label">Publications</span><span class="pa-val">' + pubHtml + '</span></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</details>';
  }).join('');
}

async function loadPanelAppSource(symbol, ensemblGeneId, elId, baseUrl, cache) {
  var el = document.getElementById(elId);
  if (!el) return;
  el.innerHTML = '<span class="info-placeholder">Loading\u2026</span>';

  var results = await queryPanelApp(symbol, baseUrl, cache);

  if (results !== null && results.length === 0) {
    var hgncDoc = ensemblGeneId in _hgncCache
      ? _hgncCache[ensemblGeneId]
      : await fetchHgnc(ensemblGeneId);
    if (hgncDoc) {
      if (hgncDoc.symbol && hgncDoc.symbol !== symbol) {
        results = await queryPanelApp(hgncDoc.symbol, baseUrl, cache) || results;
      }
      if (results.length === 0) {
        var prev = Array.isArray(hgncDoc.prev_symbol) ? hgncDoc.prev_symbol
                 : (hgncDoc.prev_symbol ? [hgncDoc.prev_symbol] : []);
        for (var i = 0; i < prev.length && results.length === 0; i++) {
          results = await queryPanelApp(prev[i], baseUrl, cache) || results;
        }
      }
    }
  }

  var allPmids = [];
  (results || []).forEach(function(r) {
    (r.publications || []).forEach(function(p) {
      var m = String(p).match(/\d+/);
      if (m) allPmids.push(m[0]);
    });
  });
  if (allPmids.length) await fetchPubmedSummaries(allPmids);

  el.innerHTML = renderPanelApp(results || [], baseUrl);
  equalizePills(el, '.pa-badge');
  equalizePills(el, '.pa-moi-short');
}

function equalizePills(container, selector) {
  var pills = Array.prototype.slice.call(container.querySelectorAll(selector));
  if (!pills.length) return;
  pills.forEach(function(p) { p.style.width = ''; });
  var maxW = pills.reduce(function(m, p) { return Math.max(m, p.offsetWidth); }, 0);
  if (maxW > 0) pills.forEach(function(p) { p.style.width = maxW + 'px'; });
}

function loadPanelApp(symbol, ensemblGeneId, suffix) {
  loadPanelAppSource(symbol, ensemblGeneId, 'panelapp-aus-' + suffix,
    'https://panelapp-aus.org', _panelappAusCache);
  loadPanelAppSource(symbol, ensemblGeneId, 'panelapp-gel-' + suffix,
    'https://panelapp.genomicsengland.co.uk', _panelappGelCache);
}

function loadIgvIframe(url) {
  var igvIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-igv');
  var hashIdx = url.indexOf('#');
  var base = hashIdx >= 0 ? url.substring(0, hashIdx) : url;
  var hash = hashIdx >= 0 ? url.substring(hashIdx) : '';
  igvIframe.src = base + '?_t=' + Date.now() + hash;
}

function loadSample(pdfUrl, htmlUrl, rowId, spliceaiUrl, ucscUrl, ucscRenderUrl, ensemblGeneId, symbol) {
  var pdfIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-pdf');
  pdfIframe.src = '';
  clearTimeout(_pdfTimeout);
  _pdfTimeout = setTimeout(function() { pdfIframe.src = pdfUrl; }, 50);

  var activeTab = _activeTabs['viewer-short'];
  var igvUrl = htmlUrl + '#row=' + rowId;
  if (activeTab === 'igv') {
    loadIgvIframe(igvUrl);
    _pendingIgv = null;
  } else {
    _pendingIgv = igvUrl;
  }
  document.getElementById('spliceai-link').href = spliceaiUrl;
  if (activeTab === 'spliceai-lookup') {
    var spliceaiIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-spliceai');
    spliceaiIframe.src = '';
    spliceaiIframe.src = spliceaiUrl;
    _pendingSpliceAI = null;
  } else {
    _pendingSpliceAI = spliceaiUrl;
  }
  if (activeTab === 'ucsc-short') {
    var ucscShortEl = document.getElementById('viewer-ucsc-short');
    document.getElementById('ucsc-link-short').href = ucscUrl;
    ucscShortEl.src = ucscWithPix(ucscRenderUrl, ucscShortEl);
    _pendingUcscShort = null;
  } else {
    _pendingUcscShort = { url: ucscUrl, renderUrl: ucscRenderUrl };
  }

  if (activeTab === 'gene-info-short') {
    loadGeneInfo(ensemblGeneId, 'short');
    _pendingGeneInfoShort = null;
  } else {
    _pendingGeneInfoShort = ensemblGeneId;
  }
  if (activeTab === 'panelapp-short') {
    loadPanelApp(symbol, ensemblGeneId, 'short');
    _pendingPanelAppShort = null;
  } else {
    _pendingPanelAppShort = { symbol: symbol, geneId: ensemblGeneId };
  }

  switchTab(document.getElementById('viewer-short'), activeTab);
}

function loadStrucSample(pdfUrl, samplotUrl, svpvUrl, ucscUrl, ucscRenderUrl, ensemblGeneId, symbol) {
  var strucPdfIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-struc-pdf');
  strucPdfIframe.src = '';
  clearTimeout(_strucPdfTimeout);
  _strucPdfTimeout = setTimeout(function() { strucPdfIframe.src = pdfUrl; }, 50);

  document.getElementById('viewer-samplot').src = samplotUrl;

  var svpvIframe = document.getElementById('viewer-svpv');
  svpvIframe.src = '';
  var activeTab = _activeTabs['viewer-struc'];
  if (activeTab === 'svpv') {
    svpvIframe.src = svpvUrl;
    _pendingSvpv = null;
  } else {
    _pendingSvpv = svpvUrl;
  }

  if (activeTab === 'ucsc') {
    var ucscEl = document.getElementById('viewer-ucsc');
    document.getElementById('ucsc-link').href = ucscUrl;
    ucscEl.src = ucscWithPix(ucscRenderUrl, ucscEl);
    _pendingUcsc = null;
  } else {
    _pendingUcsc = { url: ucscUrl, renderUrl: ucscRenderUrl };
  }

  if (activeTab === 'gene-info-struc') {
    loadGeneInfo(ensemblGeneId, 'struc');
    _pendingGeneInfoStruc = null;
  } else {
    _pendingGeneInfoStruc = ensemblGeneId;
  }
  if (activeTab === 'panelapp-struc') {
    loadPanelApp(symbol, ensemblGeneId, 'struc');
    _pendingPanelAppStruc = null;
  } else {
    _pendingPanelAppStruc = { symbol: symbol, geneId: ensemblGeneId };
  }

  switchTab(document.getElementById('viewer-struc'), activeTab);
}

</script>
